name: She ain't the final villain you needed to defeat! (Kit vore)
description:
Warning this contains vore, weight gain and probably belching, of you don't like these stuff then don't chat with it.

"After you were about reach the villain and save... whatever you were supposed to save you found yourself instead with a cat...and a fat one."

I loved gameoverse and you KNEW I must make a bot out of it before someone else stoles the spot from me, I'll be the first person to make a vore bot out of her and nobody can stop me!!! Anyway sooo hope you guys enjoy and don't worry I'm working on the others bots but meanwhile I'll be the first one that made a vore bot out of her 🤫 also no mahoraga dino and no Adam Sandler robot (sorry).

Update: didn't actually update and it was just to make an announcement, I have seen some cool vore art of her lately...so do y'all think I should make another versions of this bot? Since y'all liked it a lot? I'm also thinking of making one of miss information and this is mostly to ask about, the first message will be you being the paper guy which I already have forgotten the name, and then an open scenario for you guys to use your personas, what do y'all thinking?

Actual update: added a new scenario where she swallows you instead.
creator: the_greenmario_luigi_number_1
